title: Ukraine Was on a Roll. Then a Clash Over War Strategy Exploded Into View.
summary_full: From an underground parking garage, Ukraine’s newly dismissed defense minister aired the most dramatic, public critique of the military command to emerge during the war.
summary_public: From an underground parking garage, Ukraine’s newly dismissed defense minister aired the most dramatic, public critique of the military command to emerge during the war.
